base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_namco_credit_variants — a ui (logo) from 1981 galaga. 3 copyright-line variants shown stacked: '© 1981 NAMCO LTD.' plain text / 'namco' logo + '© 1981 NAMCO LTD.' / '© 1981 MIDWAY MFG. CO.' Midway-licensed US release. Game cycles through these during attract. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
